name: Customer Support
typicalArchitecture: RAG agent with CRM integration, knowledge base retrieval, and tool-calling for ticket creation and order lookup
commonAgentPattern: Single agent with retrieval tools, connected to helpdesk API and knowledge base

name: RAG Pipeline
typicalArchitecture: Document retrieval with vector search, context assembly, and LLM synthesis with source attribution
commonAgentPattern: Retriever → reranker → synthesizer pipeline with optional query rewriting

name: Code Generation
typicalArchitecture: LLM agent generating code with sandbox execution, test validation, and iterative refinement
commonAgentPattern: Code generation agent with execution environment and test runner tools

name: Data Extraction
typicalArchitecture: Structured output extraction from unstructured documents using schema-guided LLM calls
commonAgentPattern: Document parser → LLM extractor → schema validator pipeline

name: Research Agents
typicalArchitecture: Multi-step web search and synthesis agents that gather, analyze, and summarize information
commonAgentPattern: Search → gather → analyze → synthesize multi-agent workflow

name: Voice Agents
typicalArchitecture: Real-time speech-to-text → LLM reasoning → text-to-speech pipeline with sub-second latency requirements
commonAgentPattern: STT → LLM agent → TTS pipeline with interrupt handling and turn management

name: Workflow Automation
typicalArchitecture: Multi-step task execution agent with API integrations, conditional logic, and human-in-the-loop approvals
commonAgentPattern: Planner agent → executor agent with tool calls to external APIs and approval gates

name: Content Generation
typicalArchitecture: LLM-powered content creation with brand voice enforcement, fact-checking, and editorial guidelines
commonAgentPattern: Brief intake → draft generation → review → refinement pipeline

name: AI Chatbot
typicalArchitecture: Conversational agent with retrieval-augmented generation, intent classification, and multi-turn memory management
commonAgentPattern: Intent classifier → retrieval agent → response generator with memory and guardrails

name: AI Coding Assistant
typicalArchitecture: Code-aware LLM agent with repository context, sandbox execution, test validation, and iterative debugging
commonAgentPattern: Context retrieval → code generation → sandbox execution → test validation → refinement loop

name: AI Email Assistant
typicalArchitecture: Email processing agent with intent detection, draft generation, attachment handling, and send approval workflows
commonAgentPattern: Email intake → intent classification → draft generation → compliance check → human approval → send

name: Agentic RAG
typicalArchitecture: Multi-step retrieval agent that autonomously plans queries, retrieves from multiple sources, and synthesizes with source attribution
commonAgentPattern: Query planner → multi-source retriever → reranker → synthesizer with iterative refinement and source tracking
